footer.description: Quote, 3D preview, request and handover — everything in one place.

home.subtitle: From cost estimate to assembly in your home — five steps, each one visible from start to finish.

step1.title: Estimate
step1.text: Get a transparent price from material and dimensions in a minute.

step2.title: Configure
step2.text: Adjust size, material and hardware and see the result live.

step3.title: Request
step3.text: Send the spec — we confirm the drawing and the timeline.

step4.title: Build
step4.text: We cut, edge and assemble in our own workshop.

step5.title: Install
step5.text: We deliver and mount on-site to the millimetre.

p1.title: Own workshop
p1.text: No middlemen — we control every stage, from cut to finish.

p2.title: Transparent pricing
p2.text: The calculator shows the full breakdown before you commit.

p3.title: See it first
p3.text: The configurator previews your piece before a single board is cut.

p4.title: Millimetre precision
p4.text: On-site measurement — the piece fits your space exactly.

cta.title: Ready to start from a drawing?
cta.text: Estimate the cost or send a request — we reply within one business day.

calculatorPage.title: Cost calculator
calculatorPage.description: Choose the product, dimensions, material and hardware — the estimate updates live. The figure is a preliminary guide; the final price is confirmed after on-site measurement.
calculatorPage.disclaimer: Preliminary estimate. Final price is set after measurement and drawing approval.
calculatorPage.cta: Send this spec as a request

configuratorPage.title: Configurator
configuratorPage.description: Set the parameters and watch the front elevation and price redraw in real time. The drawing follows your choices — size, material and hardware.
configuratorPage.disclaimer: A schematic preview, not a manufacturing drawing. Final geometry is agreed during design.

orderPage.title: Send a request
orderPage.description: Leave your details and a short brief. We’ll get back within one business day to confirm the drawing, timeline and price.
orderPage.successText: Thank you! We’ll contact you shortly. For a faster reply, message us on WhatsApp or Telegram.
orderPage.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or reach us on WhatsApp.
orderPage.errPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.description: A selection of completed projects — wardrobes, kitchens, shelving and more, each built to a custom drawing.
portfolioPage.empty: No projects in this category yet.

reviewsPage.title: Reviews
reviewsPage.description: What clients say after delivery and installation.
